violations.description: ToastDescription uses hardcoded classes `dark:text-muted-foreground` instead of design tokens
violations.fix: Replace with mode.font and consistent token usage

violations.description: Separator does not import or use mode tokens
violations.fix: Add mode.radius for rounded edges when theme requires

violations.description: Pagination component does not use mode.font or mode.radius
violations.fix: Import mode from @/design-system and apply tokens

violations.description: PopoverContent uses mode.radius but not mode.font
violations.fix: Add mode.font to className

violations.description: SheetTitle does not use mode.font
violations.fix: Add mode.font to SheetTitle className

violations.description: AccordionItem uses border but no mode.radius
violations.fix: Add mode.radius if rounded corners are needed per theme

violations.description: Checkbox indicator does not use mode.font
violations.fix: Note: Checkbox indicator is icon-only, low priority

violations.description: RadioGroupItem does not use mode.font for indicator
violations.fix: Note: Radio indicator is icon-only, low priority

violations.description: Spinner and Skeleton use template literals with hardcoded strings like `"h-4 w-4"`
violations.fix: Remove unnecessary template literals around static strings

violations.description: SectionHeader uses template literals with hardcoded strings
violations.fix: Replace template literals with plain strings

violations.description: H1-H4, Lead, Body, Small, etc. inconsistently use mode.font - some have it, some don't
violations.fix: Apply mode.font consistently to all typography components
